note: TEENAGER stage. A high school posting the final-exam schedule and a course-selection deadline — school_communication. Hand-derived from taxonomy: school comms (vs daycare) are school_communication; exam schedules/course-selection are routine academic notices → surface_only. This is logistics ABOUT the teen a parent manages, NOT teen-content, so it routes normally (not the redaction cap).

input.rawContent:
From: registrar@northgate-secondary.schoolboard.ca
Subject: Final exam schedule + Grade 11 course selection

Families of Grade 10 students: the June final exam schedule is now posted on the school site. Also a reminder that Grade 11 course selections are due by April 18 through the student portal. Please review the timetable with your student.
